/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2 -fstack-protector-strong -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/run_all_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/run_all_tests.dir/main_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_all_tests.dir/provisioning_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_all_tests.dir/__/provisioning/cli_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_all_tests.dir/crypto_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_all_tests.dir/activation_test.cpp.o -o run_all_tests  ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../lib/libgtest.a -lpthread ../database/libdatabase.a ../crypto/libcrypto.a ../activation/libactivation.a ../database/libdatabase.a ../libsqlite3_lib.a ../crypto/libcrypto.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
